name: @open-horizon/marvin-mcp
description: In-repository MCP adapter for the shared Amazing Marvin client

scripts.build: npm run clean && esbuild src/server.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=esm --packages=external --banner:js='#!/usr/bin/env node' --outfile=dist/server.js && tsc --project tsconfig.json --emitDeclarationOnly
